post.description: Issue a single-use password-reset token. Always returns 200 to avoid email enumeration.

200.description: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent

post.description: Revoke the presented refresh token. Single-device.
Refresh access token using refresh token
Consume a reset token and set a new password.

get.description: Fetches a paginated list of banners.

post.description: Creates a new banner. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.

parameters.description: Start date of the banner in YYYY-MM-DD format
parameters.name: start_date

parameters.description: End date of the banner in YYYY-MM-DD format
parameters.name: end_date

parameters.description: Whether the banner is currently enabled
parameters.name: is_active

delete.description: Deletes an existing banner. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.

patch.description: Updates an existing banner. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.
patch.summary: Update an existing banner (id supplied via form data)

parameters.description: Start date of the banner in YYYY-MM-DD format
parameters.name: start_date

parameters.description: End date of the banner in YYYY-MM-DD format
parameters.name: end_date

parameters.description: Whether the banner is currently enabled
parameters.name: is_active

get.description: Fetches a paginated list of brands.

post.description: Creates a new brand. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.

parameters.description: Whether the brand is flagged as a top/featured brand
parameters.name: is_top_brand

delete.description: Deletes a brand. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.

patch.description: Updates an existing brand. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.

parameters.description: Whether the brand is flagged as a top/featured brand
parameters.name: is_top_brand

get.description: Fetches a paginated list of categories.

post.description: Creates a new category. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.

parameters.description: Whether the category is flagged as a top/featured category
parameters.name: is_top_category

delete.description: Deletes an existing category. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.

patch.description: Updates an existing category. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.

parameters.description: Whether the category is flagged as a top/featured category
parameters.name: is_top_category

post.description: Creates a new subcategory. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.

parameters.description: Whether the subcategory is flagged as a top/featured subcategory
parameters.name: is_top_sub_category

delete.description: Deletes a subcategory. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.

patch.description: Updates an existing subcategory. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.
patch.summary: Update an existing subcategory (id supplied via form data)

parameters.description: Whether the subcategory is flagged as a top/featured subcategory
parameters.name: is_top_sub_category

get.description: Fetches a paginated list of subcategories.
Fetches the data needed to populate the admin dashboard, including headline stats, daily active users, and monthly active users.
Fetches the headline stat cards for the admin dashboard: total users, average basket size, and total searches.
Fetches the data needed to populate the inventory management dashboard, including headline stats and a paginated list of products.

post.description: Creates a new inventory item in the system. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.

parameters.description: Whether the product is flagged as a top/featured item
parameters.name: is_top_item

delete.description: Deletes an existing inventory item in the system. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.

patch.description: Updates an existing inventory item in the system. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.

parameters.description: Whether the product is flagged as a top/featured item
parameters.name: is_top_item

get.description: Fetches the headline stats for the inventory management dashboard, including total categories, products, brands, and tracked delivery platforms.

post.description: Creates a new variant for a specific product. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.
post.summary: Create a new variant for a product

delete.description: Deletes an existing variant for a specific product. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.
delete.summary: Delete an existing variant for a product

patch.description: Updates an existing variant for a specific product. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.
patch.summary: Update an existing variant for a product

get.description: Fetches a list of variants for a specific product. This endpoint is intended for internal use and should be secured appropriately.
Paginated list of users. Admins see every tenant (optionally filter via ?company_id or ?unassigned=true). Non-admins are auto-scoped to their own company.

parameters.description: sort column: created_at | name | email | role (default created_at)
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: filter by company UUID (admin-only override; non-admin mismatching value → 403)
parameters.name: company_id

parameters.description: filter by role: admin | client_manager | client
parameters.name: role

parameters.description: ILIKE on name + email, max 128 chars
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: admin-only: list users with company_id IS NULL
parameters.name: unassigned

post.description: Bans a user by their unique identifier. This action is irreversible and will prevent the user from accessing the system.

dto.BannerItem.description: A promotional banner shown on the storefront.

end_date.description: Date the banner stops being visible, RFC3339

is_active.description: Whether the banner is currently enabled

start_date.description: Date the banner becomes visible, RFC3339

dto.BrandItem.description: A product brand as shown in brand listings.

image_url.description: URL of the brand's display image

is_top_brand.description: Whether the brand is flagged as a top/featured brand

product_count.description: Number of products under this brand

image_url.description: URL of the category's display image

is_top_category.description: Whether the category is flagged as a top/featured category

sub_category_count.description: Number of subcategories nested under this category

dto.DailyActiveUsers.description: Daily active user counts for the current week, keyed by day.

dto.DashboardResponse.description: Envelope for the admin dashboard endpoint.

daily_active_users.description: Active user counts for the current week

monthly_active_users.description: Active user counts for the current year

dto.DashboardStats.description: Headline stat cards shown on the admin dashboard.

average_basket_size.description: Average number of items per basket

dto.InventoryManagementsItem.description: A single product row in the inventory management list.

image_url.description: URL of the product's display image

product_category.description: Name of the category the product belongs to

stock_count.description: Units currently in stock across all variants

top_item.description: Whether the product is flagged as a top/featured item

total_variants.description: Number of variants this product has

dto.InventoryManagementsStats.description: Headline stat cards shown on the inventory management dashboard.

platforms.description: Total number of tracked delivery platforms

dto.MonthlyActiveUsers.description: Monthly active user counts for the current year, keyed by month.

dto.Pricing.description: Price and stock details for a product variant.

discounted_price.description: Price after discount, equal to Price when no discount applies

dto.ProductItem.description: A single product row as shown in product listings.

image_url.description: URL of the product's display image

is_top_item.description: Whether the product is flagged as a top/featured item

dto.ProductVariantItem.description: A single sellable variant of a product (e.g. a specific pack size).

pricing.description: Price and stock for this variant

product_volume.description: Volume or weight of this variant

dto.ProductVariantUnit.description: Volume/weight of a product variant, e.g. "500 gm".

dto.Response.description: Generic response envelope wrapping every API response.

code.description: Machine-readable error/status code, present on failures

data.description: Response payload, shape depends on the endpoint

status.description: Outcome of the request, e.g. "success" or "failed"

dto.StatsItem.description: A single dashboard metric with its month-over-month change.

diff_last_month.description: Difference versus the previous month's value

dto.SubCategory.description: A subcategory nested under a product category.

image_url.description: URL of the subcategory's display image

is_top_sub_category.description: Whether the subcategory is flagged as a top/featured subcategory

access_token.description: JWT access token used to authenticate subsequent requests

refresh_token.description: Token used to obtain a new access token once the current one expires

dto.UserDTO.description: Data Transfer Object for a User entity.

account_status.description: Account-level status, distinct from the user's active/disabled status

last_active_at.description: Timestamp of the user's last activity, RFC3339

items.description: Page of users matching the current filters
